title: FulfillmentStop
description: A specific location associated with a fulfillment (trip or journey) at which passengers board, alight, or transfer between services.

stopType.description: Role of this stop in the fulfillment (START, END, INTERMEDIATE)

scheduledTime.description: Scheduled arrival or departure time at this stop

actualTime.description: Actual arrival or departure time at this stop

stopRef.description: Reference to the Stop entity for this fulfillment stop

passengerCount.description: Passenger count at this fulfillment stop

id.description: Unique identifier for the fulfillment stop

instructions.description: Instructions for passengers at this stop

time.description: Expected time window at this stop
